Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}...So then I went to ask about it after class, and you know what happened?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Miyahara just wouldn't stop talking! He wrote out some weird math formula and said, "It's beautiful, isn't it?"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}All it did was make me more confused than I originally was. Guess I'll have to go ask again tomorrow.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I guess it just feels wrong to not try and understand something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I mean... doesn't it feel wrong to not try and understand something?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Anyways, I decided to start being serious about my future.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Remember when I told you about what happened to me at school?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}It was when I handed in a blank answer sheet for that pop quiz, and I got yelled at by Ekoda...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Back then, I just wanted to graduate and go to a community college or something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}But after coaching those kids, I started to realize something.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I enjoy helping people who are willing to give it their all. So, I've finally figured out what I wanna do with my life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 5 13 12 5 106}No, not that. I'd rather just teach. Being a professional athlete is too hard.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 5 13 12 15 106}Hmm... Close! You almost got it, Mr. Ex-Assistant Coach![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 5 13 12 5 106}I did consider that one too, but I decided I should focus on one thing specifically.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 5 13 12 5 106}Come on, {f 4 1}-kun, are you really that dense? Or did I not spell it out enough?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}I'm thinking of becoming an athletic trainer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}It's their job to monitor each athlete's diet, and help them plan their training routine.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}So I'll go to professional school once I graduate, and then work towards earning my certification when I turn twenty.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Between the general education requirements and the classes for my major, it's gonna be over 350 hours.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}That's why I'm gonna start studying right now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Improving my writing is my first goal. It took me all night to finish that three page essay.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}But those kids had a huge influence on me. I know I only agreed to coach them on a whim, but teaching them really made me think.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}I started wondering what I could teach my own kids one day... And I realized I didn't have the slightest clue.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}If you hadn't been there with me, I don't think I could've stuck it out until the end.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}And I definitely never would've thought about my future, either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko seems appreciative.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship has grown...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}I know I'm always asking you to stick around and help me with stuff.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}I just... I kinda feel bad about it. I'm sorry.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}I realized now that I might've been relying too much on you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_015_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You can rely on me even more.

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko seems restless.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I better choose my words carefully here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I better choose my words carefully here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, {f 0 1 2}I have a special{f 0 1 27}[n]{f 0 1 2}relationship with another person already{f 0 1 27}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Are you like this... just with me? N-No, no, th-that can't be it, huh...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}A-Are you... Are you sure!? I'm not girly or anything like that, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}What's happening...? Is this a dream?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko's face is bright red...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}My heart is pumping so fast, there's no way it could be a dream.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko's face is bright red...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have entered a special[n]relationship with Yuko...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's no going back now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After saying goodbye to Yuko,[n]I decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}I sure am lucky to have such a good friend who's so kind and reliable.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Although, sometimes you worry me a little...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}{f 4 1}-kun, sometimes you say suggestive things with a straight face, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}I get the feeling you might give someone the wrong idea.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}So you should really be careful about that. It could land you in some hot water.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko seems relieved.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}Wait, are you seriously asking me that?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Um, just watch your back out there, okay? Seems like you're headed for trouble.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko seems to be worried about me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}...Sorry, this isn't what I wanted to talk about.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 63 0 0}Thank you again for coaching with me. I'm glad I had someone like you to rely on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}Next time, I'll be there to support you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_116_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 66 0 0}If there's anything I can help with, just let me know, okay? We're friends, aren't we?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}I'm gonna head out. I've got to work on my modern literature and English today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko left the café in a hurry.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should head back to the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
